# Education

## Graduate Education

**Degree Name**
Start Year – End Year
University Name (City, State)

**Degree:** Master of [Field]

**Thesis (if applicable):** "Title of Thesis"

**Honors:** GPA X.XX, Cum Laude / Magna Cum Laude / etc.
**Activities:** Club or organization name

**Focus Areas:**
- Area 1
- Area 2

---

## Undergraduate Education

**Degree Name**
Start Year – End Year
University Name (City, State)

**Degree:** Bachelor of [Field]
**Major:** Your Major
**Minor (if applicable):** Your Minor

---

## How to reference in resumes

**Standard format:**
MBA, University Name | Year
BS [Field], University Name | Year

**When space is tight (one line):**
MBA – University Name (Year) · BS [Field] – University Name (Year)

**When asked to include GPA:**
MBA, University Name, GPA X.XX (Year)

**What to omit:**
- Thesis title (unless specifically relevant to the role)
- Individual course names
- Activities/clubs (unless directly relevant or role is early career)
